context: Tests whether the agent implements the composite fraud scoring function with the correct signal weights, decision thresholds, and risk-score-based 3DS enforcement using Stripe PaymentIntent options.

checklist.name: Stripe score at 40%
checklist.description: The Stripe Radar risk score is multiplied by 0.4 (weighted at 40%) as the base of the composite score

checklist.name: Velocity violation weight
checklist.description: Each velocity violation adds 15 points to the score (velocityViolations * 15)

checklist.name: Address mismatch weight
checklist.description: Address mismatch (billing ≠ shipping country) adds exactly 10 points

checklist.name: Proxy/VPN weight
checklist.description: Proxy or VPN detection adds exactly 20 points

checklist.name: Email age weight
checklist.description: Email age less than 24 hours adds exactly 15 points

checklist.name: First order + high amount weight
checklist.description: First order combined with order amount over 30000 cents adds exactly 10 points

checklist.name: Unknown device weight
checklist.description: Device fingerprint not previously seen adds exactly 5 points

checklist.name: Score capped at 100
checklist.description: The returned score is capped at a maximum of 100 (Math.min(100, ...) or equivalent)

checklist.name: 3DS challenge for high risk
checklist.description: Sets request_three_d_secure to 'challenge' when risk score is above 70

checklist.name: 3DS automatic for normal risk
checklist.description: Sets request_three_d_secure to 'automatic' for risk scores at or below 70 (not omitting the field, and not always using 'challenge')
